name: Koala Kookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix butter and powdered sugar in a large bowl until smooth and creamy.
2. Add vanilla and mix well.
3. Add flour and walnuts; mix well.
4. Roll into small balls and flatten on a greased baking sheet.
5. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 12 to 15 minutes.
6. When cookies are cool, sprinkle powdered sugar on top.
Makes about 5 dozen.
Note: Typed by R. Thompson (r-thompson@usa.net) Sept 1998
Source: Rookie Cookie's Recipes from the Mini Page, The News-Enterprise Elizabethtown KY
